messages.content: Moksh, did you know that there's a species of jellyfish that's immortal, the Turritopsis dohrnii, also known as the "immortal jellyfish"? It can transform its body into a younger state through a process called transdifferentiation.

America ka Rul kya hai bhai yah Iran ke war mein

Moksh, America ka role Iran ke war mein complex hai, lekin yeh keh sakte hain ki America ne Iran ke against kai sanctions lagaye hain aur unke saath kai baar takraayein bhi hui hain. America ne Iran ke nuclear program ko rokne ke liye kai kadam uthaye hain, aur unke saath Israel ke saath bhi milkar kaam kiya hai.
what is the role of America in this

Moksh, the role of America in the Iran conflict is complex, but it has been involved in imposing sanctions on Iran and has had several confrontations with them. America has also worked with Israel to counter Iran's nuclear program and has been involved in various diplomatic efforts to resolve the issue.
